zh.lifeSummary: 當William Goode IV於1464年出生在英國可瓦爾其斯同時，他的父親William Goode24歲，母親Joan Whitson24歲。他於1497年與Dame Millicent Whitby在英國可瓦爾其斯同結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1520年在英國英格蘭可瓦爾其斯同享年56歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭。

nameMeanings.name: Goode
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Midlands): variant of   Good  . This name has been used in Ireland since the 16th century.
Possibly an Americanized form of Dutch   Goede  .

variants.name: Good
meanings: English: nickname from Middle English gode ‘good’ (Old English gōd).

English: from the Middle English personal name Gode, representing either Old English Goda (male) or Gode (female), in part a byname and in part a short form of various compound names with the first element gōd, or perhaps a pet form of Old French names in God- such as Godfrey .
Americanized form (translation into English) of German Gut and Guth , or Dutch Goed and Goede .

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When William Goode IV was born in 1464, in Whitstone, Cornwall, England, his father, William Goode, was 24 and his mother, Joan Whitson, was 24. He married Dame Millicent Whitby in 1497, in Whitstone, Cornwall, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He died in 1520, in Whitstone, Cornwall, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 56, and was buried in England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Goode IV est né en 1464, à Whitstone, Cornouailles, Angleterre, son père, William Goode, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Joan Whitson, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Dame Millicent Whitby en 1497, à Whitstone, Cornouailles, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1520, à Whitstone, Cornouailles, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 56 ans, et a été enterré à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

Er hat 1497 in Whitstone, Cornwall, England Dame Millicent Whitby geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1520 im Alter von 56 Jahren in Whitstone, Cornwall, England, United Kingdom und wurde in England, United Kingdom begraben.

ja.lifeSummary: William Goode IVが1464年にイギリスコルンワルウィトストーンで生まれた時，父William Goodeは24歳，母Joan Whitsonは24歳であった。1497年にイギリスコルンワルウィトストーンでDame Millicent Whitbyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1520年にイギリスイギリスコルンワルウィトストーンで56歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: William Goode IV(이)가 1464년 영국 코른월 휘츠톤에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Goode(은)는 24세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan Whitson(은)는 24세였다. 그는 1497년 영국 코른월 휘츠톤에서 Dame Millicent Whitby(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1520년 영국 잉글랜드 코른월 휘츠톤에서 56세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Goode IV родился в 1464 г. в местности уицтоун, корнвалл, Англия, его отцу по имени William Goode было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Joan Whitson, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Dame Millicent Whitby в 1497 г. в местности уицтоун, корнвалл, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1520 г. в местности уицтоун, корнвалл, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 56 лет и был похоронен в местности Англия, Великобритания.
